message.content: Read specs/RALPH_SCRIPTS.md and return ONLY the specification for check-plan-size.sh script. Include: purpose, flags, behavior, exit codes. Max 300 tokens.

1в†’# SPEC-1: Ralph Automation Scripts Suite
     2в†’
     3в†’> **Location**: `ralph/scripts/`
     4в†’> **Priority**: P1 (Critical)
     5в†’> **Source**: ralph-fixes/RALPH_MANUAL.md Section 7, ralph-fixes/RALPH_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md Part 4
     6в†’
     7в†’---
     8в†’
     9в†’## Overview
    10в†’
    11в†’Create a suite of automation scripts in `ralph/scripts/` to enable quick mid-course corrections and automatic plan maintenance. These scripts are essential for steering Ralph during 24h+ autonomous runs.
    12в†’
    13в†’---
    14в†’
    15в†’## Scripts to Implement
    16в†’
    17в†’### 1. archive-completed.sh
    18в†’
    19в†’**Purpose**: Archive completed tasks from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md to reduce file size.
    20в†’
    21в†’**Usage**:
    22в†’```bash
    23в†’./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh             # Archive completed tasks
    24в†’./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --dry-run   # Preview changes
    25в†’./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --phase 3   # Archive specific phase
    26в†’./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --all       # Archive everything completed
    27в†’```
    28в†’
    29в†’**Behavior**:
    30в†’1. Read IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
    31в†’2. Extract all lines with `[x]` (completed tasks)
    32в†’3. Extract resolved GAP sections (GAP-X...RESOLVED)
    33в†’4. Create dated folder: `ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/YYYY-MM-DD/`
    34в†’5. Write `completed-tasks.md` and `resolved-gaps.md` to archive folder
    35в†’6. Remove archived content from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
    36в†’7. Report: "Archived N tasks, plan reduced from X to Y lines"
    37в†’
    38в†’**Output Structure**:
    39в†’```
    40в†’ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/
    41в†’в””в”Ђв”Ђ 2026-01-20/
    42в†’    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ completed-tasks.md
    43в†’    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ resolved-gaps.md
    44в†’    в””в”Ђв”Ђ summary.txt
    45в†’```
    46в†’
    47в†’---
    48в†’
    49в†’### 2. request.sh
    50в†’
    51в†’**Purpose**: Create `ralph/@fix_plan.md` for immediate task injection.
    52в†’
    53в†’**Usage**:
    54в†’```bash
    55в†’./ralph/scripts/request.sh "Create API documentation"
    56в†’./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template docs "Application startup"
    57в†’./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template test "AuthService"
    58в†’./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template fix "Login timeout bug"
    59в†’./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template feature "Dark mode toggle"
    60в†’./ralph/scripts/request.sh --priority P1 "Critical security fix"
    61в†’```
    62в†’
    63в†’**Templates**:
    64в†’
    65в†’**Default Template**:
    66в†’```markdown
    67в†’# Immediate Task: {{TITLE}}
    68в†’
    69в†’## Objective
    70в†’{{DESCRIPTION}}
    71в†’
    72в†’## Deliverables
    73в†’1. [Specify deliverable]
    74в†’
    75в†’## Acceptance Criteria
    76в†’- [ ] [Criterion 1]
    77в†’
    78в†’## Completion Signal
    79в†’<promise>FIX_COMPLETE</promise>
    80в†’```
    81в†’
    82в†’**docs Template**:
    83в†’```markdown
    84в†’# Immediate Task: Documentation - {{TITLE}}
    85в†’
    86в†’## Objective
    87в†’Create comprehensive documentation for {{TITLE}}.
    88в†’
    89в†’## Deliverables
    90в†’1. Documentation file in `docs/` or appropriate location
    91в†’2. Update `ralph/AGENTS.md` if operational commands involved
    92в†’
    93в†’## Sections Required
    94в†’- Overview
    95в†’- Prerequisites
    96в†’- Step-by-step instructions
    97в†’- Verification steps
    98в†’- Troubleshooting
    99в†’
   100в†’## Acceptance Criteria
   101в†’- [ ] Documentation is complete and follows project style
   102в†’- [ ] Can follow docs from scratch without assumed knowledge
   103в†’
   104в†’## Completion Signal
   105в†’<promise>DOCS_COMPLETE</promise>
   106в†’```
   107в†’
   108в†’**test Template**:
   109в†’```markdown
   110в†’# Immediate Task: Tests - {{TITLE}}
   111в†’
   112в†’## Objective
   113в†’Write comprehensive tests for {{TITLE}}.
   114в†’
   115в†’## Deliverables
   116в†’1. Test file in appropriate `__tests__/` directory
   117в†’2. All tests passing
   118в†’
   119в†’## Requirements
   120в†’- Unit tests for all public methods
   121в†’- Edge cases and error conditions
   122в†’- Integration tests if applicable
   123в†’
   124в†’## Acceptance Criteria
   125в†’- [ ] All tests passing with `bun test <path>`
   126в†’- [ ] Coverage for main functionality
   127в†’
   128в†’## Completion Signal
   129в†’<promise>TESTS_COMPLETE</promise>
   130в†’```
   131в†’
   132в†’**fix Template**:
   133в†’```markdown
   134в†’# Immediate Task: Bug Fix - {{TITLE}}
   135в†’
   136в†’## Objective
   137в†’Fix the bug: {{TITLE}}
   138в†’
   139в†’## Investigation
   140в†’1. Reproduce the issue
   141в†’2. Identify root cause
   142в†’3. Implement fix
   143в†’4. Add regression test
   144в†’
   145в†’## Acceptance Criteria
   146в†’- [ ] Bug is fixed
   147в†’- [ ] Regression test added
   148в†’- [ ] All existing tests still pass
   149в†’
   150в†’## Completion Signal
   151в†’<promise>FIX_COMPLETE</promise>
   152в†’```
   153в†’
   154в†’**feature Template**:
   155в†’```markdown
   156в†’# Immediate Task: Feature - {{TITLE}}
   157в†’
   158в†’## Objective
   159в†’Implement feature: {{TITLE}}
   160в†’
   161в†’## Deliverables
   162в†’1. Feature implementation
   163в†’2. Tests for the feature
   164в†’3. Documentation if user-facing
   165в†’
   166в†’## Acceptance Criteria
   167в†’- [ ] Feature works as specified
   168в†’- [ ] Tests passing
   169в†’- [ ] No regressions
   170в†’
   171в†’## Completion Signal
   172в†’<promise>FEATURE_COMPLETE</promise>
   173в†’```
   174в†’
   175в†’**Behavior**:
   176в†’1. Parse arguments for description and template
   177в†’2. Generate @fix_plan.md from template
   178в†’3. Write to `ralph/@fix_plan.md`
   179в†’4. Echo: "Created ralph/@fix_plan.md - Run ./ralph/loop.sh to execute"
   180в†’
   181в†’---
   182в†’
   183в†’### 3. focus.sh
   184в†’
   185в†’**Purpose**: Add/remove session focus signposts in PROMPT_build.md.
   186в†’
   187в†’**Usage**:
   188в†’```bash
   189в†’./ralph/scripts/focus.sh "Complete Phase 7.2 only"  # Add focus
   190в†’./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --show                      # Show current focus
   191в†’./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --remove                    # Remove focus
   192в†’```
   193в†’
   194в†’**Signpost Format** (added to TOP of PROMPT_build.md):
   195в†’```markdown
   196в†’## SESSION FOCUS (Remove when complete)
   197в†’
   198в†’This session: {{FOCUS_DESCRIPTION}}
   199в†’
   200в†’---
   201в†’```
   202в†’
   203в†’**Behavior**:
   204в†’1. `--show`: Check if signpost exists, display it
   205в†’2. `--remove`: Remove signpost block from PROMPT_build.md
   206в†’3. Default: Add signpost to top of PROMPT_build.md
   207в†’4. Backup original to `.PROMPT_build.md.bak`
   208в†’
   209в†’---
   210в†’
   211в†’### 4. check-plan-size.sh
   212в†’
   213в†’**Purpose**: Validate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md size, warn if too large.
   214в†’
   215в†’**Usage**:
   216в†’```bash
   217в†’./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh              # Check with default 400 line limit
   218в†’./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --warn-at 300  # Custom warning threshold
   219в†’./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --fail         # Exit 1 if exceeded
   220в†’```
   221в†’
   222в†’**Output**:
   223в†’```
   224в†’IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 234 lines (OK, max: 400)
   225в†’```
   226в†’or
   227в†’```
   228в†’WARNING: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 520 lines (exceeds 400)
   229в†’Consider running: ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh
   230в†’```
   231в†’
   232в†’**Exit Codes**:
   233в†’- 0: Under limit
   234в†’- 1: Over limit (with --fail flag)
   235в†’
   236в†’---
   237в†’
   238в†’### 5. refresh-plan.sh
   239в†’
   240в†’**Purpose**: Regenerate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md from specs (disposable plans philosophy).
   241в†’
   242в†’**Usage**:
   243в†’```bash
   244в†’./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh                  # Full refresh
   245в†’./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --keep-learnings # Preserve learnings section
   246в†’./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --archive        # Archive current first
   247в†’```
   248в†’
   249в†’**Behavior**:
   250в†’1. Archive current plan to `IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/YYYY-MM-DD-pre-refresh.md`
   251в†’2. Run `./ralph/loop.sh plan 3` to regenerate
   252в†’3. Report completion
   253в†’
   254в†’---
   255в†’
   256в†’### 6. check-context.sh
   257в†’
   258в†’**Purpose**: Check token budget of key Ralph files before iteration.
   259в†’
   260в†’**Usage**:
   261в†’```bash
   262в†’./ralph/scripts/check-context.sh
   263в†’```
   264в†’
   265в†’**Checks**:
   266в†’| File | Max Tokens | Calculation |
   267в†’|------|------------|-------------|
   268в†’| IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md | 15,000 | words * 1.3 |
   269в†’| AGENTS.md | 2,000 | words * 1.3 |
   270в†’
   271в†’**Output**:
   272в†’```
   273в†’Context Budget Check:
   274в†’  IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: ~12,400 tokens (OK, max: 15,000)
   275в†’  AGENTS.md: ~1,800 tokens (OK, max: 2,000)
   276в†’```
   277в†’or
   278в†’```
   279в†’WARNING: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: ~18,500 tokens (exceeds 15,000)
   280в†’Consider running: ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh
   281в†’```
   282в†’
   283в†’---
   284в†’
   285в†’## Implementation Notes
   286в†’
   287в†’1. All scripts must be executable (`chmod +x`)
   288в†’2. Use `#!/bin/bash` shebang
   289в†’3. Support `--help` flag with usage information
   290в†’4. Use consistent logging format: `[INFO]`, `[WARN]`, `[ERROR]`
   291в†’5. Handle missing files gracefully
   292в†’6. Create backups before modifying files
   293в†’
   294в†’---
   295в†’
   296в†’## Acceptance Criteria
   297в†’
   298в†’- [ ] All 6 scripts exist in `ralph/scripts/`
   299в†’- [ ] All scripts are executable
   300в†’- [ ] All scripts support `--help`
   301в†’- [ ] `archive-completed.sh` correctly archives and removes completed tasks
   302в†’- [ ] `request.sh` creates valid @fix_plan.md with all templates
   303в†’- [ ] `focus.sh` correctly adds/removes signposts
   304в†’- [ ] `check-plan-size.sh` reports accurate line counts
   305в†’- [ ] `refresh-plan.sh` archives and regenerates plan
   306в†’- [ ] `check-context.sh` estimates token counts
   307в†’

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

file.content:
# SPEC-1: Ralph Automation Scripts Suite

> **Location**: `ralph/scripts/`
> **Priority**: P1 (Critical)
> **Source**: ralph-fixes/RALPH_MANUAL.md Section 7, ralph-fixes/RALPH_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md Part 4

---

## Overview

Create a suite of automation scripts in `ralph/scripts/` to enable quick mid-course corrections and automatic plan maintenance. These scripts are essential for steering Ralph during 24h+ autonomous runs.

---

## Scripts to Implement

### 1. archive-completed.sh

**Purpose**: Archive completed tasks from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md to reduce file size.

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh             # Archive completed tasks
./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --dry-run   # Preview changes
./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --phase 3   # Archive specific phase
./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --all       # Archive everything completed
```

**Behavior**:
1. Read IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
2. Extract all lines with `[x]` (completed tasks)
3. Extract resolved GAP sections (GAP-X...RESOLVED)
4. Create dated folder: `ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/YYYY-MM-DD/`
5. Write `completed-tasks.md` and `resolved-gaps.md` to archive folder
6. Remove archived content from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
7. Report: "Archived N tasks, plan reduced from X to Y lines"

**Output Structure**:
```
ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/
в””в”Ђв”Ђ 2026-01-20/
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ completed-tasks.md
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ resolved-gaps.md
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ summary.txt
```

---

### 2. request.sh

**Purpose**: Create `ralph/@fix_plan.md` for immediate task injection.

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/request.sh "Create API documentation"
./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template docs "Application startup"
./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template test "AuthService"
./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template fix "Login timeout bug"
./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template feature "Dark mode toggle"
./ralph/scripts/request.sh --priority P1 "Critical security fix"
```

**Templates**:

**Default Template**:
```markdown
# Immediate Task: {{TITLE}}

## Objective
{{DESCRIPTION}}

## Deliverables
1. [Specify deliverable]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] [Criterion 1]

## Completion Signal
<promise>FIX_COMPLETE</promise>
```

**docs Template**:
```markdown
# Immediate Task: Documentation - {{TITLE}}

## Objective
Create comprehensive documentation for {{TITLE}}.

## Deliverables
1. Documentation file in `docs/` or appropriate location
2. Update `ralph/AGENTS.md` if operational commands involved

## Sections Required
- Overview
- Prerequisites
- Step-by-step instructions
- Verification steps
- Troubleshooting

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Documentation is complete and follows project style
- [ ] Can follow docs from scratch without assumed knowledge

## Completion Signal
<promise>DOCS_COMPLETE</promise>
```

**test Template**:
```markdown
# Immediate Task: Tests - {{TITLE}}

## Objective
Write comprehensive tests for {{TITLE}}.

## Deliverables
1. Test file in appropriate `__tests__/` directory
2. All tests passing

## Requirements
- Unit tests for all public methods
- Edge cases and error conditions
- Integration tests if applicable

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests passing with `bun test <path>`
- [ ] Coverage for main functionality

## Completion Signal
<promise>TESTS_COMPLETE</promise>
```

**fix Template**:
```markdown
# Immediate Task: Bug Fix - {{TITLE}}

## Objective
Fix the bug: {{TITLE}}

## Investigation
1. Reproduce the issue
2. Identify root cause
3. Implement fix
4. Add regression test

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Bug is fixed
- [ ] Regression test added
- [ ] All existing tests still pass

## Completion Signal
<promise>FIX_COMPLETE</promise>
```

**feature Template**:
```markdown
# Immediate Task: Feature - {{TITLE}}

## Objective
Implement feature: {{TITLE}}

## Deliverables
1. Feature implementation
2. Tests for the feature
3. Documentation if user-facing

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature works as specified
- [ ] Tests passing
- [ ] No regressions

## Completion Signal
<promise>FEATURE_COMPLETE</promise>
```

**Behavior**:
1. Parse arguments for description and template
2. Generate @fix_plan.md from template
3. Write to `ralph/@fix_plan.md`
4. Echo: "Created ralph/@fix_plan.md - Run ./ralph/loop.sh to execute"

---

### 3. focus.sh

**Purpose**: Add/remove session focus signposts in PROMPT_build.md.

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/focus.sh "Complete Phase 7.2 only"  # Add focus
./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --show                      # Show current focus
./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --remove                    # Remove focus
```

**Signpost Format** (added to TOP of PROMPT_build.md):
```markdown
## SESSION FOCUS (Remove when complete)

This session: {{FOCUS_DESCRIPTION}}

---
```

**Behavior**:
1. `--show`: Check if signpost exists, display it
2. `--remove`: Remove signpost block from PROMPT_build.md
3. Default: Add signpost to top of PROMPT_build.md
4. Backup original to `.PROMPT_build.md.bak`

---

### 4. check-plan-size.sh

**Purpose**: Validate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md size, warn if too large.

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh              # Check with default 400 line limit
./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --warn-at 300  # Custom warning threshold
./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --fail         # Exit 1 if exceeded
```

**Output**:
```
IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 234 lines (OK, max: 400)
```
or
```
WARNING: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 520 lines (exceeds 400)
Consider running: ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh
```

**Exit Codes**:
- 0: Under limit
- 1: Over limit (with --fail flag)

---

### 5. refresh-plan.sh

**Purpose**: Regenerate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md from specs (disposable plans philosophy).

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh                  # Full refresh
./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --keep-learnings # Preserve learnings section
./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --archive        # Archive current first
```

**Behavior**:
1. Archive current plan to `IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/YYYY-MM-DD-pre-refresh.md`
2. Run `./ralph/loop.sh plan 3` to regenerate
3. Report completion

---

### 6. check-context.sh

**Purpose**: Check token budget of key Ralph files before iteration.

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/check-context.sh
```

**Checks**:
| File | Max Tokens | Calculation |
|------|------------|-------------|
| IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md | 15,000 | words * 1.3 |
| AGENTS.md | 2,000 | words * 1.3 |

**Output**:
```
Context Budget Check:
  IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: ~12,400 tokens (OK, max: 15,000)
  AGENTS.md: ~1,800 tokens (OK, max: 2,000)
```
or
```
WARNING: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: ~18,500 tokens (exceeds 15,000)
Consider running: ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh
```

---

## Implementation Notes

1. All scripts must be executable (`chmod +x`)
2. Use `#!/bin/bash` shebang
3. Support `--help` flag with usage information
4. Use consistent logging format: `[INFO]`, `[WARN]`, `[ERROR]`
5. Handle missing files gracefully
6. Create backups before modifying files

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 6 scripts exist in `ralph/scripts/`
- [ ] All scripts are executable
- [ ] All scripts support `--help`
- [ ] `archive-completed.sh` correctly archives and removes completed tasks
- [ ] `request.sh` creates valid @fix_plan.md with all templates
- [ ] `focus.sh` correctly adds/removes signposts
- [ ] `check-plan-size.sh` reports accurate line counts
- [ ] `refresh-plan.sh` archives and regenerates plan
- [ ] `check-context.sh` estimates token counts

content.text:
## check-plan-size.sh Specification

**Purpose**: Validate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md size, warn if too large.

**Flags**:
- `--warn-at <N>` - Custom warning threshold (default: 400 lines)
- `--fail` - Exit with code 1 if exceeded

**Behavior**:
1. Count lines in IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
2. Compare against threshold (default 400)
3. Output status message with current line count and limit
4. If under limit: normal message format
5. If over limit: warn and suggest running `./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh`

**Exit Codes**:
- `0`: Under limit
- `1`: Over limit (when `--fail` flag used)

**Output Examples**:
- OK: `IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 234 lines (OK, max: 400)`
- Warning: `WARNING: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 520 lines (exceeds 400)`
